cause_analysis.narrative: Wellness Revolution Texas Katy churned on 2026-03-23 after 229 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 35-day silence starting 2025-12-25. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 38 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-19 via phone_call, client wrote: "Wellness Revolution, how can I help you? Hello, hi. Am I speaking to Kelly? No, she's not in right now. Can I take a mes…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-23 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: FORMAL NOTICE OF CANCELLATION — Zoca Service Agreement (Doc ID: DFA7A8011-E5QSQLODPTE0B939Q06EJ4WHYIR2WH01L…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

Subject: Kelli, Your Payment is Due in 2 Days!\n\nBody: 96 Upcoming Payment Hope you are doing well! This is a quick heads-up that Zoca subscription for your Katy Wellness Revolution Texas is due in 2 days. We just wanted to make sure everything goes through smoothly so your service continues without interruption. Rene…

Good Morning Kelli, I hope the weekend gave you a little breathing room.  The best marketing tool you have is the client already sitting in your chair. Before they walk out, book their next visit. That one simple habit can transform your revenue month after month.  Make today count!
Did you get a chance to schedule a meeting?
I also see that the leads you’ve gotten are mostly unresponsive. Could you please help me understand the pattern or strategy you use to call or follow up with these leads.
Hey Kelli, Good Morning!  Hope your day's off to a great start.

Good afternoon, Wellness Revolution. How can I help you? Hi, am I talking to Kelly? No, Kelly's not here. Okay, can you please leave a message for her saying that my name is Kanak and I'm trying to connect to her from Zoka? Okay, and do you have a number? Yes, I do. It's plus 1-978-312-5094. Okay, and can you spell you…
Here's my calendar if you'd like to pick a time: https://calendly.com/kanak-s-zoca/zoca-call?utm_term=62146&utm_content=3696 or call me at +1 (978) 312-5094.  Looking forward to connecting, Kelli.

I wanted to firstly apologize that things have come to this point. I also really appreciate you being so thorough and giving us proper notice. That says a lot about you. Your request is being taken care of, so no worries there. We still have time through April 2, and I'd love the chance to hop on a quick call to unders…
Happy Monday, hope you had a relaxing weekend!
Yes, we have received the email.
Good Morning Kelli,
Hey Ian/Kelli, I hope you are doing well!
I have forwarded you the agreement on the email you have provided.

Hi! We've sent a formal cancellation notice for our Zoca Service Agreement (Doc ID: DFA7A8011) to hello@zoca.com and kanak.s@zoca.com today, Feb 13, 2026. Please confirm receipt of the email at your earliest convenience. Thank you.

Hi! Could you send us a copy of your cancellation policy? Please email it to marketco@fiercesix.com and CC kelli@fiercesix.com . Thank you!
Hello! I'm so sorry for the delayed response. I will email you the cancellation policy tomorrow morning. You will receive the email from kanak.s@zoca.com

Good morning Ian,  Let's start posting fresh photos every week on your profile. It really does make a big difference in getting more clicks and eyes on your business. Whenever you snap some pics or a 20-30 seconds of a video at your business, just upload those through your Zoca App, it takes like a minute.  Wishing you…

Good Morning Ian, Happy Wednesday!  We're halfway through the week already! Hope your books are looking good and your clients are leaving happy. Keep up the great work, and if there's anything I can help with, I'm just a text away.  Have a productive rest of the week!

Morning Ian! Quick thought: that regular who's been coming to you for months? They're worth so much more than just today's appointment. They trust you, they refer friends, they keep your calendar steady. Treat today's first-timers like future regulars - because they could be. Have a wonderful day!

Good afternoon, Wellness Revolution. How can I help you? Hi, am I talking to Ian? This is Dr. Patel's office and Dr. Walker's office. Okay, is this Katie Wellness Revolution? Yes. Okay, can I talk to the owner, please? The owner doesn't work here. Okay, can you give me the email or phone number where I can connect with…

Hey Ian! Hope your week's off to a good start.  Just a quick thought- February is honestly one of the best months for building loyal clients. People searching for “scalp detox near me" right now? They're not just one-timers. A lot of them turn into regulars through spring if the experience is right. And yours always is…

Good morning Ian!  As you wrap up the week, remember this: in the beauty and wellness industry, your reputation compounds. Every great client experience this week creates reviews, referrals, and repeat bookings for next month. You're not just working day-to-day - you're building long-term growth.  Hope you finish stron…

Subject: A quick note for you!\n\nBody: 96 Hi Kelli It’s Mannica again. You might have seen my note earlier. I’ve been working with salons and spas for about three years now. One thing I keep coming back to is this - reviews matter far more today than they did even a few years ago. Earlier, star ratings were the whole …

Good afternoon, Wellness Revolution. How can I help you? Hi, am I talking to Em? Who? Am I talking to Em? No. Who are you looking for? Is this Katie Wellness Revolution, Texas? It is. Okay, I just wanted to connect with the owner. Okay, she's not in at the moment. Can I take a message? For sure. So you can just let her…
Thank you for calling Texas Recovery and Infusion Center. We're sorry we're unavailable at this time. Please leave your name.
